name: Strawberry Rhubarb Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh or frozen sliced rhubarb
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rhubarb, orange juice, and granulated sugar in a medium-sized saucepan.
2. Stir together until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally.
4. Reduce temperature to low and simmer gently for 7 to 12 minutes or until the rhubarb is tender but most of the pieces still have some shape.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in cinnamon, cloves, ground nutmeg, and vanilla extract.
6. Stir in sliced strawberries. Taste and add more sugar if necessary, depending on the sweetness of the berries.
7. Serve warm or cold as a sauce for ice cream, spooned over pound cake or shortcake, or stirred into porridge. Sauce can be prepared several days in advance and refrigerated.
